title: stisseria normalis
intro: Stisseria normalis, also known as the Black Stisseria or Morning Glory, is a species of flowering plant in the Convolvulaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to aid in relaxation and reduce anxiety, making it a natural remedy for insomnia and stress relief. The plant contains alkaloids that have been shown to have sedative and antispasmodic effects, providing health benefits such as improved sleep quality and reduced muscle tension. Stisseria normalis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
